instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: A picnic on Sunday
task.initialEmail: Hi,||The weather should be good on Sunday, so I’m planning a picnic in the park. [1]Would you like to come?[/1]||[2]Can you bring something to eat?[/2] I’m going to bring drinks and fruit.||[3]Where in the park should we meet?[/3] It’s quite big.||[4]Do you think we should invite our classmates too?[/4]||Write soon||Freya

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Freya,||Thanks for your email. [1]Yes, I’d love to come to the picnic because I haven’t been to the park for ages.[/1]||[2]I can bring some sandwiches and biscuits. I’ll make enough for several people, so don’t worry about food.[/2]||[3]I think we should meet near the lake because it is easy to find and there is lots of space to sit.[/3]||[4]I don’t think we should invite all our classmates because the picnic might become too difficult to organise.[/4]||See you on Sunday,||Molly
